description: Final certification bundle for the swarm-ops (asupersync-vssefs.9) program. Aggregates every child bead's contract artifact, contract test, runtime source, proof-command pointer, and evidence class into one fail-closed certification surface so future agents and operators can verify the entire swarm-ops cockpit program without reading the original idea-wizard notes. The bundle certifies the children listed in child_certifications at the recorded HEAD; it does not certify wall-clock performance, multi-process distributed swarms, release gates, or any surface listed in does_not_cover.
certified_at_head_policy: certified_at_head records the main-branch commit at which all child evidence below was verified together. Consumers must treat a bundle whose certified_at_head is not an ancestor of their HEAD as invalid, and may treat any divergence between certified_at_head and their HEAD as stale_evidence requiring recertification via proof_command before relying on the bundle for release or operator claims.

evidence_classes.synthetic_fixture: Schema, policy, and planner logic validated against in-test fixtures. No claim that a runtime scenario executed.
evidence_classes.lab_runtime_deterministic: Real lab-runtime execution (run_swarm_replay_scenario) under deterministic virtual time inside the contract test. No wall-clock, multi-process, or production-deployment claims.
evidence_classes.no_mock_rch_backed: Real lab-runtime execution dispatched through RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec with recorded remote worker provenance and a fail-closed runner script.
evidence_classes.benchmark: Criterion wall-clock evidence. NOT covered by this bundle; owned by the PERF gauntlet lanes.
evidence_classes.release: Release-gate certification evidence. NOT covered by this bundle; owned by the gauntlet program.

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][scenario-dsl] Define workload scenario schema and replay corpus
covers: scenario schema validation
replay corpus scenario ids and scale/pressure/failure knobs
run_in_contract scenarios execute through the real lab runtime
does_not_cover: wall-clock behavior of corpus scenarios
scenario execution outside the deterministic lab runtime

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][rch] Build proof-lane planner with remote-only provenance
covers: proof-lane planner decision logic (Ready / RefreshStaleInputs / RefuseUntilRemoteProof)
remote-required command requirements (RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1, rch exec, CARGO_TARGET_DIR, feature scope)
stale-head, missing-provenance, and local-fallback fail-closed findings
does_not_cover: execution of the planned proof lanes themselves
RCH infrastructure availability or worker health

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][memory] Add memory residency and brownout policy model
covers: memory residency planning and brownout decision schema
nominal / brownout-optional / no-win / unsupported decision separation
does_not_cover: real memory pressure measurement on production hosts
OS-level memory accounting

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][contention] Add lock and scheduler contention heatmap ledger
covers: contention heatmap ledger construction from real lab traces
lock / scheduler-lane / region / queue hotspot ranking and severity
stale-baseline and incomplete-evidence fail-closed verdicts
does_not_cover: wall-clock lock contention measurement (requires lock-metrics feature on live runtimes)
production scheduler telemetry

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][minimizer] Add deterministic swarm failure minimizer
covers: deterministic reduction of failing swarm scenarios to minimal reproductions
invariant-preservation checks during reduction
owner routing for cancellation storms, deadlock/lost-wakeup suspects, obligation leaks
does_not_cover: minimization of failures that cannot be reproduced in the lab runtime
automatic root-cause identification

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][cockpit] Add operator cockpit report contract
covers: operator cockpit report schema joining scenario, trace, contention, proof, minimizer, memory, and redaction evidence
pass / degraded / no-win / blocked / stale-evidence / malformed / unsupported outcome separation
fail-closed behavior on missing or unsafe evidence
does_not_cover: report transport or storage outside the repository
operator UI rendering beyond the compact text format

child_certifications.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-ops][e2e] Add no-mock cockpit proof runner
covers: end-to-end no-mock proof: scenario corpus -> real lab run -> trace summary -> contention ledger -> proof lane -> cockpit report bundle
RCH-only execute mode with recorded worker provenance
structural fail-closed behavior: missing provenance always yields Blocked, never Pass
does_not_cover: medium / large profile execution as a closeout requirement (runnable but optional and expensive)
wall-clock performance of the proof runner itself

deferred_items.title: [idea-wizard][swarm-scale][autopilot] Add scheduler feedback controller from pressure metrics
deferred_items.reason: Child of the parent swarm-scale epic (asupersync-vssefs), not of the swarm-ops epic (asupersync-vssefs.9). Remains open with its own owner and is explicitly outside this bundle's certification scope.

covers: swarm-ops cockpit program completeness: scenario DSL, proof-lane planner, memory policy, contention heatmap, failure minimizer, cockpit report, and no-mock proof runner are all source-backed, contract-tested, and closed
deterministic lab-runtime execution evidence for corpus, heatmap, minimizer, cockpit report, and proof runner surfaces
one RCH-backed no-mock closeout proof with remote worker provenance (asupersync-vssefs.9.7)
does_not_cover: wall_clock_performance_baselines (benchmark evidence class; owned by PERF gauntlet lanes such as asupersync-zb2a7h)
multi_process_or_multi_host_distributed_swarms (lab runtime models swarms in one process)
production_deployment_sizing_or_capacity_planning
release_gate_certification (owned by the gauntlet program)
scheduler_feedback_controller (deferred; see deferred_items)
live_lock_metrics_instrumentation (contention evidence is lab-trace-derived unless the lock-metrics feature is enabled on a live runtime)
fail_closed_rules: missing or unparsable child artifact file invalidates the certification
missing child contract test file invalidates the certification
child artifact bead_id or contract_version mismatch invalidates the certification
a child without embedded closure evidence (verified_status closed + verified_closed_at) invalidates the certification
a live beads snapshot that covers the certified subgraph and shows a certified child as not closed (and not explicitly deferred) invalidates the certification
missing or non-remote-required proof command at a child's proof_command_pointer invalidates the certification
an evidence class outside evidence_classes, or a bundle-level claim of benchmark/release evidence, invalidates the certification
a dependency cycle among the embedded depends_on_within_program edges invalidates the certification
certified_at_head that is empty, malformed, or not an ancestor of the consumer's HEAD invalidates the certification for that consumer
proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_TEST_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_swarm_ops_certification_bundle cargo test -p asupersync --test swarm_ops_certification_bundle_contract --features test-internals -- --nocapture

operator_handoff.support_boundary_summary: The swarm-ops program certifies deterministic lab-runtime swarm operation tooling with one RCH-backed no-mock proof lane. It does not certify wall-clock performance, distributed multi-host swarms, release gates, or live production telemetry. Operators needing those surfaces must consult the gauntlet program and the deferred scheduler feedback controller bead.

beads_snapshot_policy: Closure evidence (verified_status, verified_closed_at) and dependency edges (depends_on_within_program) are embedded per child as the certification snapshot, because RCH workers exclude .beads/ from sync. The live beads snapshot is cross-checked only when it covers the certified subgraph (real repository checkouts); a live snapshot that covers the subgraph and disagrees with the embedded evidence invalidates the certification.

graph_check.advisory: No cycles detected - dependency graph is a proper DAG (advanced_insights.cycle_break)
graph_check.equivalent_check: tests/swarm_ops_certification_bundle_contract.rs runs Kahn topological sort over the embedded depends_on_within_program edges on every execution
